description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that runs on every push and pull request. Use three Windows 2019 jobs with different build configurations: build-win10 with matrix toolset [Win32, x64] and config [Debug, Release], build-win10-dev with matrix toolset [x64] and config [RelWithDebInfo] and an additional DEVELOPMENT flag, and build-win8 with matrix toolset [x64] and config [Release] targeting Windows 8.1. For each job, clone two repositories, configure CMake, build, and run tests. Upload artifacts for Release configurations.
